_deprecated_reason: papers CLI 위임 (papers/.own own 9). N6-001 entry는 papers/manifest.json에 통합됨 (canonical_n6_invariants.md, status=draft).

_historical: 2026-04-14 Zenodo deposition meta — papers manifest로 흡수 — archived as record

metadata.title: The Eight Canonical n=6 Number-Theoretic Invariants as an Atlas Primitive Basis
metadata.description: We identify the minimal primitive basis from which the canonical cross-domain bridges of the NEXUS reality atlas (atlas.n6, 76510 lines, 20510 nodes, 24390 edges as of 2026-04-14) are constructible: eight integer invariants of n=6 under standard number-theoretic functions (n, phi, tau, sigma, sopfr, mu, J2, M3). We demonstrate (i) that 151 canonical @S bridges generate exactly 38 distinct binary-operation labels over this basis, (ii) that a 2026-04-14 hub-growth run distributed +277 new hub promotions non-uniformly across seven of the eight primitives (M3=72, mu=60, J2=32, sigma=22, sopfr=19, tau=15, phi=10, n=0 by deliberate anti-saturation), and (iii) that the basis is minimal under negative-control removal. All numeric claims are traceable to committed JSON/JSONL artifacts.
metadata.notes: Reproducibility: every numeric claim in the paper corresponds to a committed file path listed in Appendix C. Atlas HEAD reference at paper time: 8a17aeb0c46307ed9fb2a5be2b62c702ab2aac75.

steps: 1. POST metadata JSON (above .metadata field) to create deposition
2. PUT each files_to_attach entry to the deposition bucket URL
3. POST /actions/publish to finalise and receive DOI
4. Record the returned DOI + html_url in shared/discovery/zenodo_doi_registry.jsonl
upload_instructions_if_approved.blocked_by: f-no-external-send-without-request — user must explicitly request upload
